use_codes.desc: TREATING VIRAL INFECTIONS IN A WARM-BLOODED ANIMAL

indications.text:
Topical corticosteroids are indicated for the relief of the inflammatory and pruritic manifestations of corticosteroid-
responsive dermatoses.
CONTRAINDICATONS
Topical corticosteroids are contraindicated in those patients with a history of hypersensitivity to any of the
components of the preparation...
